description:
A desktop app for ComfyUI, the most powerful and modular diffusion model GUI, api and backend with a graph/nodes interface

ComfyUI Desktop is a packaged way to use ComfyUI and comes bundled with a few things:
- Stable version of ComfyUI from releases
- ComfyUI_frontend
- ComfyUI-Manager
- uv
On startup, it will install all the necessary python dependencies with uv and start the ComfyUI server. The app will automatically update with stable releases of ComfyUI, ComfyUI-Manager, and the uv executable as well as some desktop specific features.
What's Changed
- Ignore Claude configuration files in CI workflows by @robinjhuang in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/pull/1188
- Add Claude Code configuration files by @robinjhuang in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/pull/1187
- Bumping ComfyUI core to v0.3.40 by @robinjhuang in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/pull/1186
- [feat] add optional bypass for disk space validation during installation by @christian-byrne in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/pull/1191
- [chore] Pin third-party GitHub Actions to commit SHAs by @webfiltered in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/pull/1185
- [CI] Improve Claude Code command for version bump by @webfiltered in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/pull/1197
- Update ComfyUI core to v0.3.41 by @webfiltered in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/pull/1198
- [CI] Improve version update PR details by @webfiltered in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/pull/1200
- v0.4.52 by @webfiltered in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/pull/1201
- Add Cosomos workflow templates (0.1.29) by @webfiltered in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/pull/1202
- Allow help files to be auto-updated by @webfiltered in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/pull/1203
Full Changelog: https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/compare/v0.4.51...v0.4.52
